name: Automotive Components
summary: Stable production solutions for steering, drivetrain, and braking components.
description: Automotive component projects require high batch stability, dimensional consistency, and traceability. We support this with standardized fixtures, controlled process parameters, and documented inspection workflows.

seo.meta_description: Machining application solutions for automotive components.

name: Industrial Automation Equipment
summary: Reliable machining support for machine structures and precision modules.
description: For automation equipment builders, we provide flexible machining for structural and positioning parts. Our delivery model helps clients complete project milestones and acceptance schedules on time.

seo.meta_description: Machining and supply support for industrial automation equipment.

name: General Machinery Export
summary: Supports export-oriented machinery programs with stable quality and lead time.
description: For export markets, we support multi-spec production requirements with stable quality, pre-shipment checks, and technical documentation support to improve global customer trust.

seo.meta_description: Integrated machining and delivery support for export-oriented machinery products.
